message:
ci: add crates.io publish job and optimize release workflow

- Add publish-crates job that runs after release (skips pre-releases)
- Add workflow_dispatch input for manual release triggering
- Add version output for downstream jobs
- Prepare Cargo.toml for crates.io: readme, homepage, documentation fields
- Exclude non-essential files from crates.io package

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -4,6 +4,11 @@ on:
   push:
     tags: ['v*']
   workflow_dispatch:
+    inputs:
+      tag:
+        description: 'Tag to release (e.g., v0.1.0)'
+        required: true
+        type: string
 
 concurrency:
   group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
@@ -97,7 +102,17 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Extract version
         id: version
-        run: echo "version=${GITHUB_REF#refs/tags/v}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+        run: |
+          if [ -n "${{ inputs.tag }}" ]; then
+            echo "version=${{ inputs.tag }}" | sed 's/^v//' >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+            echo "tag=${{ inputs.tag }}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+          else
+            echo "version=${GITHUB_REF#refs/tags/v}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+            echo "tag=${GITHUB_REF#refs/tags/}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+          fi
+
+      - name: List artifacts
+        run: ls -la dist/
 
       - uses: actions/attest-build-provenance@e8998f949152b193b063cb0ec769d69d929409be
         with:
@@ -106,5 +121,26 @@ jobs:
       - uses: softprops/action-gh-release@a06a81a03ee405af7f2048a818ed3f03bbf83c7b
         with:
           name: v${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}
+          tag_name: ${{ steps.version.outputs.tag }}
           generate_release_notes: true
           files: dist/*
+
+    outputs:
+      version: ${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}
+
+  publish-crates:
+    name: Publish to crates.io
+    needs: release
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 15
+    if: ${{ !contains(github.ref, '-') }}
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@34e114876b0b11c390a56381ad16ebd13914f8d5
+      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@f7ccc83f9ed1e5b9c81d8a67d7ad1a747e22a561
+        with:
+          toolchain: nightly
+      - name: Publish to crates.io
+        if: ${{ env.CARGO_REGISTRY_TOKEN != '' }}
+        env:
+          CARGO_REGISTRY_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.CARGO_REGISTRY_TOKEN }}
+        run: cargo publish --all-features

@@ -5,9 +5,23 @@ edition = "2024"
 rust-version = "1.85"
 description = "TOON reference implementation in Rust (JSON <-> TOON)"
 license = "MIT"
+readme = "README.md"
+homepage = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/toon_rust"
 repository = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/toon_rust"
+documentation = "https://docs.rs/toon_rust"
 keywords = ["cli", "json", "serialization", "llm", "encoding"]
 categories = ["command-line-utilities", "encoding"]
+exclude = [
+    ".beads/",
+    ".github/",
+    "perf.data",
+    "AGENTS.md",
+    "EXISTING_TOON_RUST_STRUCTURE.md",
+    "PLAN_TO_PORT_TOON_RUST_TO_RUST.md",
+    "PROPOSED_ARCHITECTURE.md",
+    "tests/golden_outputs/",
+    "toon_illustration.webp",
+]
 
 [[bin]]
 name = "tr"
